item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder for students in grades 9 to 12 that want to dress down during your exams; you must donate at least 2 uniform items to the main office before Friday, June 12th for your name to be on the list given to teachers.

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There is a DRAMA Club meeting tomorrow at lunch in rm.209

item.title: A message from Unity Club:
item.description: Reminder to all panelists from the Asian Heritage and Pride Month events, please come to room 127 at lunch for our official debriefing and celebration.

item.title: A message from Mme Perron:
item.description: There is a mandatory Europe Team meeting today at lunch in room 125 All travelers must attend. Please bring your lunch

item.title: Reminder to all Grade 7 students:
item.description: Please submit your permission form for the year-end trip to your homeroom teacher as soon as possible. The deadline for submission is Monday, June 15th. Thank you!

item.title: A message from M. Benoit:
item.description: Congratulations to our Grade 7 and 8 Ravens flag football teams who were in Cornwall yesterday competing in a friendly tournament. Both teams represented STA with pride, sportsmanship and hard work. STA - A finished the day with an impressive record of 3 wins, 1 tie and 1 loss, while STA-B also had a strong showing with 2 wins, 2 ties, and 1 loss. A special shout-out goes to our high school coaches for their support and leadership in helping make the day a success.
